products.name: Nobody Clapped Hoodie
products.description: For the private wars. For the quiet wins. For the people who kept going with no audience.

products.name: Pain Into Proof Tee
products.back: I DID NOT BREAK. I BECAME EVIDENCE.
products.description: A statement piece for turning your worst chapters into proof you survived them.

products.name: Built Unfinished Long Sleeve
products.back: THE STORY IS NOT DONE WITH ME.
products.description: For the ones still under construction but no longer ashamed of the process.

products.name: Motion Coordinates Hoodie
products.front: I WEAR MY SCARS LIKE COORDINATES
products.description: A darker cinematic piece built around survival, memory, and direction.

products.name: Overloaded Tee
products.front: I AM NOT NUMB. I AM OVERLOADED.
products.description: For the overthinkers, the ADHD minds, and the people who feel too much but still function somehow.

products.name: Still Moving Beanie
products.description: Simple, wearable, and instantly tied to the movement.

products.name: No Witness Hoodie
products.back: I MADE IT THROUGH WHAT NEVER MADE THE NEWS.
products.description: For the people who had to survive in silence.

products.name: Cycle Breaker Tee
products.front: I BROKE CYCLES WITH SHAKING HANDS
products.description: For the ones trying to become better than what raised them, hurt them, or shaped them.

products.name: Comeback Wasn't Clean Tee
products.description: For the messy rebuild. For the ones who are still here.

products.name: The Wreckage Collection Signed Lyric Print
products.front: I TURNED THE WRECKAGE INTO RHYTHM.
products.description: Limited signed lyric-style art print for fans who connect with the deeper side of the music.

products.name: Halfway Understood Tee
products.back: LOVE ME REAL OR LET ME BREATHE.
products.description: For the ones tired of being reduced to the easiest version of their story.

products.name: Still Becoming Hoodie
products.back: I AM NOT WHO I WAS. I AM NOT WHO I'M DONE BECOMING.
products.description: For the rebuild season. For the people changing in real time.

products.name: Motion Over Madness Tee
products.back: WHEN MY MIND GOT LOUD, I MOVED.
products.description: For turning mental chaos into momentum.

products.name: Private War Hoodie
products.description: For the people who look okay because explaining got exhausting.

products.name: Do Not Disappear Wristband
products.description: A small reminder for the days when staying feels like the hardest thing.
